name_cn:
🌱 Brown mixed with brown-yellow 🍮 color
I L❤️oewe you
Crazy about the mini puzzle
A beautiful color that captivates countless goddesses
❤️Mini size: 18*12.5*8cm
❤️The bag's own weight is almost negligible, super practical. Carrying a phone, small wallet, lipstick, and powder feels effortless, making life easy and happy. 😇😇 (XS and Plus sizes are both fine)
❤️Authentic exclusive unpacked custom, high-end exclusive private custom hardware, imported calfskin, German imported Saffiano thread, imported YKK zippers, ZP craftsmanship
